dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The rules-context-loader and alignment-engine steps both completed successfully with schema validation, indicating strict adherence to the defined governance framework and rule sets.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
